//! Crate-level doc comment
//! describing the crate.

/// Adds two numbers.
///
/// # Examples
///
/// ```
/// let r = mylib::add(2, 3);
/// ```
pub fn add(a: i32, b: i32) -> i32 {
    // inline comment
    let url = "https://example.com/*not-a-comment*/";
    let pattern = "/*still*/ not a comment";
    a + b /* trailing block */
}

/*
 * Multi-line block comment
 * describing the struct below.
 */
pub struct Point {
    pub x: f64,  // x coordinate
    pub y: f64,  // y coordinate
}
